headline: 2 Services Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. Furthermore, the demand for their offerings is rising as more clients outsource non-core functions, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 9.4% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
